user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Refactor the TC387 GTM TOM 3‑phase inverter PWM from IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl to the unified IfxGtm_Pwm API using the same TOM1 channels and pins, center‑aligned complementary PWM at 20 kHz with 0.5 µs dead‑time and 1.0 µs minimum pulse, active‑high, push‑pull, pad driver cmosAutomotiveSpeed1, Fxclk0 clock, and initial duties U=25%, V=50%, W=75%. Keep public functions initGtmTomPwm() and updateGtmTomPwmDutyCycles() and use unified API shadow‑transfer gating for atomic duty updates; all other behavior unchanged.
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate 3‑phase complementary PWM on GTM TOM1 CH1..CH6 driving P00.[2..7] with atomic, synchronous (shadow‑gated) updates of all six channels, honoring frequency, alignment, polarity, dead‑time, min‑pulse, drive mode, and initial duties.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use the unified high‑level IfxGtm_Pwm driver. Initialize via IfxGtm_Pwm_initConfig/IfxGtm_Pwm_init, configure TOM1 channels/pins with IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout (push‑pull, cmosAutomotiveSpeed1), ensure Fxclk0 via IfxGtm_Cmu_enableClocks, set 20 kHz center‑aligned mode and complementary outputs with dead‑time/min‑pulse through the configuration. Start outputs with IfxGtm_Pwm_startSyncedChannels. Perform atomic duty updates for all six channels with IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate so a single shadow transfer applies to the whole set.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: User explicitly requires migration to the unified GTM PWM API and to use its shadow‑transfer gating for atomic updates. IfxGtm_Pwm provides init/start and bulk immediate update APIs required for synchronous multi‑channel PWM operation.

runtime_function.name: updateGtmTomPwmDutyCycles
runtime_function.purpose: Atomically update all six TOM1 channels (CH1..CH6) in one gated shadow transfer using the unified API so U/V/W complementary pairs update synchronously. Input duties map to [U_H, U_L, V_H, V_L, W_H, W_L] with complementary generation and dead‑time constraints maintained.

driver_changes: Replace IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl with IfxGtm_Pwm for PWM generation
api_changes: IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl_setMode → Mode configured in IfxGtm_Pwm configuration
Manual TGC shadow‑transfer trigger → IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate (atomic gated update)
migration_notes.context_preserved: Public APIs initGtmTomPwm() and updateGtmTomPwmDutyCycles() remain unchanged. The same TOM1 channels and P00.[2..7] pins are used. Frequency, center‑alignment, complementary outputs, active‑high polarity, dead‑time (0.5 µs), min pulse (1.0 µs), push‑pull, pad driver cmosAutomotiveSpeed1, Fxclk0, and initial U/V/W duties are preserved. The unified driver’s bulk immediate update function provides the requested atomic shadow‑transfer behavior across TOM1 TGC0 for CH1..CH6.

PWM.rationale: Driver locked by refiner node (user explicit or engine-scored)
